# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in KGLite, please report it responsibly.

**Do NOT open a public issue.** Instead, use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/kkollsga/kglite/security/advisories/new) to submit a report.

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and aim to release a fix within 7 days for critical issues.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest released version receives security updates.
